title: Vanilla Spice Visuals
description: Enhances vanilla Minecraft by adding some block variants, a few 3D models, and retexturing lackluster blocks!
body:
<u>Vanilla Spice</u> is a resource pack that is basically just a texture pack but with a few 3D models and block variants. It aims to keep the overall _vanilla_ vibes of Minecraft by leaving most textures alone, but _spices_ it up by retexturing/remodeling some lackluster blocks. 

Compatible with **1.14 to 1.21.10**. Minecraft may say it is "Incompatible" for any version other than 1.21.8, but it should still work.

This resource pack includes:

**<u>Variants for:</u>**

- <u>short grass</u> (shorter short grass, sparser short grass, vanilla short grass, clovers, clover flowers, and 3D pebbles!)
- <u>bookshelves</u> (a variety of textures with different probabilities to make large bookshelves look more organic; slightly fancier style to suit enchantment rooms and library builds)
- <u>mushrooms</u> (small, medium, large, extra large, and cluster variants for both brown and red mushrooms; prettier designs in general; to compliment giant mushrooms, brown mushrooms have flat caps and red mushrooms have fuller caps with white scales)

**<u>3D models for:</u>**

- <u>ladders</u>! (still very vanilla in texture, just 3D)
- <u>minecart rails</u>! (also vanilla in style, just 3D)
- <u>pebbles</u> (technically a short grass variant; uses stone's texture)

**<u>Remodeled:</u>**

- <u>fences</u> (unique 3D models for each color fence to add variety; nether brick fences are modeled after wrought iron fences for victorian/goth builds)
- <u>fence gates</u> (swing open at one hinge rather than being double doors, unique gate doors with custom textures designed after their respective door/trapdoor textures)

**<u>Retextured:</u>**

- <u>andesite, diorite, granite</u> (and their polished versions to be more visually interesting and accurate to real life; polished diorite and granite are designed to work well as marble in builds)
- <u>stained glass</u> (much more vibrant colors, sectioned into leaded panes to give a more traditional stained glass look; panes based on redstone lamps; clear glass has the same shaped panes but in vanilla white colors for a more vanilla feel)
- <u>resin blocks</u> (including bricks and clumps, are given a more realistic deep amber color and shading, rather than flat orange)
- <u>iron block, iron door, iron trapdoor</u> (deeper metallic grey color to better represent real iron; block has studs like copper; iron door retextured to suit a larger variety of builds)
- <u>iron bars, copper bars</u> (more resemble old fashioned elevator gates rather than prison bars)
- <u>lanterns</u> (have a wire grate to fit the vibes of the stained glass and iron blocks)
- <u>carpets</u> (subtle knitted/braided texture; added fringe to model; slightly warmer colors)
- <u>bricks</u> (slight variation in color for each brick to make them less uniform)
- <u>mud bricks</u> (slightly more grey with a different brick pattern to allow for versatile role in builds)
- <u>red nether bricks</u> (fishbone brick pattern with brick color variation, also to allow for a more versatile role in builds)
- <u>glowstone</u> (has a warmer glow from within and compliments netherrack better)
- <u>rain</u>! (and rain particles to be whiter and more transparent for softer rain showers)

**<u>Tweaked:</u>**

- <u>iron chain</u> (recolored to match the leading in stained glass)
- <u>chiseled bookshelves</u> (wooden sides better match normal bookshelves/oak planks)
- <u>nether bricks</u> (copied the small brick layer for the top brick layer to allow brick pattern to interlock correctly)

**<u>Possible future updates:</u>**

- leaf litter variety (could be just in color of leaves, or also textures)

**<u>Notes:</u>**

Optifine is <u>not</u> necessary; this pack should work with or without shaders.

Again this texture pack should work for Minecraft versions 1.14 through 1.21.10, just bypass the "incompatible" warning by clicking yes; worst case senario is some textures/models are broken and you can just put this texture pack back on the "available" side. 

I do plan on making a Bedrock version of this pack, but it may take a while.

If you prefer certain vanilla textures over mine, feel free to delete mine from the pack folder, just don't upload my altered pack as your own. 

Likewise do not use any of my textures or models in your own resource pack. Of course I don't own things like 3D ladders or clover grass variants, but <u>just don't copy paste</u>.
